The average accuracy of the cross sections.

Thin Nb-93 and Ni-nat samples in assembly with Al
monitors were used. The samples were manufactured by
cutting from a metallic foil. The total levels of
chemical impurities in Ni, Nb and Al samples were no
LAHET, CEM95, CEM2K, CASCADE, INUCL and YIELDX
